case_title: MARISSA GERSTENZANG VS. JOSEPH COZZA SALON

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-03-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY GERSTENZANG, MARISSA AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH COZZA SALON ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERSTENZANG, MARISSA AS TO DEFENDANT JOSEPH COZZA SALON

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-19-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-19-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF MARISSA GERSTENZANG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JOSEPH COZZA SALON IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOSEPH A BISAZZA PRESIDENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF GERSTENZANG, MARISSA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GERSTENZANG, MARISSA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOSEPH COZZA SALON COURT DISMISSES COMPLAINT PURSUANT TO TWO YEAR STATUE OF LIMITATIONS CCP335.1, COMPLAINT FILED JAN-25-2019. COURT FINDS BASED ON ALL EVIDENCE PROCEDURE OCCURRED JAN-24-2017. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
